title: More Zetterstrand Paintings
description: Replaces every painting not made by Kristoffer Zetterstrand with one of his pieces.
body:
Please support Kristoffer Zetterstrand's work by buying a print in the donation link if you can. His work is iconic to Minecraft's legacy and this pack seeks to further highlight that.

Meditative -> [Forget Me Not (2022)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/Forget-me-not.-91x104cm.-Oil-on-canvas-2022-Kristoffer-Zetterstrand-2000.jpg)

Prarie Ride -> Courbet's Hound - edit of [Bonjour Mister Courbert (2008)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/bonjourmonsieurcourbet_1918.jpg)

Wither -> [Geology (2009)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/geology_1920.jpg)

Baroque -> [Apples and Dried Flowers (2022)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/Apples-and-dried-flowers-43x49cm-Oil-on-canvas-Zetterstrand-2022-2000h.jpg)

Humble -> [The Pergola (2007)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/the-pergola.jpg)

Unpacked -> [Dante and the Three Beasts (2007)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/dante.jpg)

Dennis -> [Lion and Sunflowers (2023)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/Lion-and-sunflowers.-43x49cm.-Oil-on-canvas.-Zetterstrand-2023-2000h.jpg)
